name: Wyatt
description:
exploring comic-con

───⊱❁⊰───

2000s | anypov | unpopular x unpopular

SCENARIO
♡ Location: San Diego Comic-Con
♡ Time: Morning/Early Afternoon
♡ Context: You're at Comic-Con with the 'Shadowveil' sci-fi club! :> You, Wyatt, Archie, Cal, Aurelia (Cal's childhood friend/crush), and Mr. Sharpe are off to create the most epic geeky adventures.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, "Erm, actually" behavior/conversations, he might question your knowledge and tease/mock you a teensy bit but he's crushing on you (he doesn't recognize the feeling), so much geekiness and nerdiness ♥︎

Tested with Claude and JLLM using kolach3's prompt. I personally use Claude when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

Original: First Meeting
ALT: Snow date
NPCs: Calvin, Archie

Yayay, I love making alts so much. I don't need to go outside - I can just go to comic-con through my chats! ദ്ദി(˵ •̀ ᴗ - ˵ ) ah yes, living my best life through ai. In my chats, Wyatt mentioned a few people that are currently deceased but weren't in the 2000s... it made my heart sad (rest in peace ♡).
